page_metadata.biotools__summary: On-line service for predicting binding affinity of peptides toward the TAP transporter. The Prediction is based on cascade SVM, using sequence and properties of the the amino acids.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: On-line service for predicting binding affinity of peptides toward the TAP transporter. The Prediction is based on cascade SVM, using sequence and properties of the the amino acids.
